page_metadata.biotools__summary: fermo-core is the backend of the metabolomics dashboard FERMO. It can be used for large-scale processing of metabolomics data and integration of phenotypic and other orthogonal data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: fermo-core is the backend of the metabolomics dashboard FERMO. It can be used for large-scale processing of metabolomics data and integration of phenotypic and other orthogonal data.
